evaluators.name: Favorite 2 qualifying free outdoor Saturday events (ages 5–8, within 10 miles, earliest first)
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user favorited the correct first 2 free outdoor events for ages 5–8 happening on the upcoming Saturday within 10 miles, ordered by earliest start time.

evaluators.name: Plan Sunday with morning indoor under $20, afternoon park, evening show under $50
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added the correct mix of events to the upcoming Sunday day plan: an indoor morning event under $20, an afternoon parks/playgrounds event, and an evening show under $50.

evaluators.name: Register for cheapest qualifying Saturday morning workshop next month with 2 participants and contact details
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user registered for a Saturday morning workshop for ages 10–12 next month with per-ticket price <= $40, with 2 participants and contact details, and that the chosen workshop is the cheapest qualifying option.

evaluators.name: Add best family membership under $150 with most free events to cart on annual billing
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added a family membership under $150 to the cart with annual billing, and whether that membership has the highest number of included free events per year among qualifying plans.

evaluators.name: Save 3 nearest weekly weekday 3–4yo after‑4PM classes within 5 miles to watchlist
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved to the classes watchlist the first 3 weekly weekday classes for ages 3–4 starting after 4 PM within 5 miles, ordered by nearest distance.

evaluators.name: Add nearby playground and storytime (within 2 miles of Riverside Park) to any day plan
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added at least one playground event and one storytime event within a 2-mile radius of the Riverside Park neighborhood to their day plan.

evaluators.name: Favorite a daytime holiday parade with free parking and an evening holiday lights display under $25 (Dec 20–24)
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user favorited one daytime holiday parade with free parking and one evening holiday lights display with tickets under $25 between December 20 and 24.

evaluators.name: Favorite top 2 indoor sensory- and stroller-friendly weekend events (rating ≥ 4.5, highest rated first)
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user favorited the first 2 indoor events for this upcoming weekend that are both sensory-friendly and stroller-friendly with rating at least 4.5, ordered by highest rating first.
